# LogRateLimiter constructor

Creates a limiter with the given minimum interval between log notifications.

```csharp
public LogRateLimiter(long intervalMs = 50)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| intervalMs | The minimum milliseconds between successive log notifications. Defaults to 50 ms (RC-3). |
